qwen-next-80B-autoround-load: Intel/Qwen3-Coder-Next-int4-AutoRound (full 80B, 512exp) FAILS to load on ROCm: KeyError model.layers.0.mlp.gate.qweight. The AutoRound build QUANTIZED the MoE router to int4 (checkpoint has gate.qweight/qzeros/scales), but SGLang correctly builds the router as unquantized BF16 (MoE rule) → checkpoint's quantized gate keys have no destination. Needs a gate-dequant-at-load patch OR our own 80B build (router stays BF16). Also: coder-next preset hardcoded QUANT=moe_wna16; made overridable (auto-round needs QUANT=auto-round config-match).
